scope: LENS V2 flagship cinematic reference mapping and Playwright inspection framework

checks.name: alignment_with_visual_direction_doctrine
checks.description: Every reference deep-dive cites and respects the doctrine clauses it serves; comparison matrix and detection guide operationalize doctrine clauses without drift.
checks.notes: Each deep-dive includes a 'Doctrine binding' header pointing at specific doctrine sections. Comparison matrix axes map directly to doctrine clauses.

checks.name: anti_dashboard_consistency
checks.description: DASHBOARD_SYNDROME_DETECTION_GUIDE primary tests reproduce ANTI_DASHBOARD_ENFORCEMENT §6-§9 rules.
checks.notes: Five-second confusion test, grid-gravity test, metric-first test, component-repetition test all match. Threshold values (3.0x dominant ratio, 2 saturated hues) calibrated per doctrine.

checks.name: executive_cognition_consistency
checks.description: Every 'what LENS avoids' clause across the nine deep-dives is grounded in EXECUTIVE_COGNITION_MODEL reader requirements.
checks.notes: All avoid clauses traceable to specific cognition-model sections (cognitive budget, scanning behavior, narrative contract, emotional contract, institutional trust).

checks.name: playwright_inspection_feasibility
checks.description: Every mechanical signal defined in PLAYWRIGHT_VISUAL_INSPECTION_FRAMEWORK is computable from rendered DOM and screenshots without speculative analysis.
checks.notes: Element-weight ratio: bounding boxes + typographic mass — computable. Grid presence: container-dimension comparison — computable. Color saturation: pixel sampling — computable. Motion timing: animation event timestamps — computable. Layout shift: CLS API — computable. First-paint to declaration: paint events + element selector — computable.

checks.name: cinematic_realism_coherence
checks.description: The comparison matrix demonstrates LENS lives in the intersection of the nine reference families, not at any single reference. This is consistent with the doctrine's positioning of LENS as institutional executive intelligence.
checks.notes: Matrix §4 explicitly states LENS is the intersection. Each family's avoid clause prevents over-borrowing. Inspection drift detection in §6 of the matrix detects single-reference over-borrowing.

checks.name: operational_seriousness_preservation
checks.description: Every borrow clause supports operational seriousness; every avoid clause prevents drift toward consumer / SaaS / playful registers.
checks.notes: Avoid clauses across the nine deep-dives systematically reject: tactical aggression (Palantir), terminal ugliness (Bloomberg), gimmick UI (visionOS), productivity register (Linear), instrumental flatness (Raycast), playful affect (Arc), marketing register (Stripe/Vercel), retro nostalgia (NASA/SpaceX), newspaper density (FT/Editorial).
